message:
test(proptest): add 28 property-based tests for semantic_shock_response module

Covers serde roundtrips for ShockAction, SemanticShockConfig, ShockRecord,
PaneShockSummary, ShockResponseMetricsSnapshot; config defaults; responder
p-value filtering, pause/alert modes, eviction, clear semantics, pane
isolation, TraumaDecision generation, metrics consistency, and GC behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
